headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks for Long-Term Investors
summary: The best-performing stocks typically have robust sales growth, increasing margins, and rising returns on capital, and those that can maintain this trifecta year in and year out often become the legends of the investing world.

headline: A Look At Lam Research (LRCX) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Lam Research Stock Is On Investors’ Radar Lam Research (LRCX) is drawing fresh attention after recent share price gains over the past month and past 3 months, prompting investors to reassess how its current valuation lines up with its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Lam Research. That sharp 9.9% 1 day share price return at a last close of US$246.49 comes on top of a 16.7% 30 day share price return and a very large 1 year total shareholder return, suggesting momentum has been...
